productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Washed Blue 3/4 Length Pants
description: Composition Blue denim three quarter length trousers made of 100% cotton, has belt loops at the waistband and an elasticated back, a hook and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing and brand name embroidered on the left leg Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one ready for the outdoors with these three quarter length trousers from Gini and Jony. The elasticated waistband gives a great fit, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
